title: April 22nd, 2022
body:
lyrics

the right roads, i don't know much about them

but when i climb trees i can see mountains

and i can set forth once i come down again

but north looks different from the ground

so i gather moss and wool around me for heat when i'm tired of pounding the streets



lyrics

if you wanna be there and see a way in, maybe take it
i'm not sayin any specific direction
you got a whole particular set of circumstances to contend with
an anyone who indicates otherwise in da cut
they got something to hide
and you don't know what
but you can bet that you're not gonna like the surprise
when they decide to show up
blow up any moves your makin
that don't fit the picture they been painting
